requirements.assertion: The fill property paints the interior of a shape with the given paint value, such as a solid color.
requirements.subject: user-agent
requirements.rationale: Reviewed mapping: the resvg pilot case painting/fill/named-color isolates this requirement, its upstream golden is a conforming oracle for this simple assertion by specification inspection, and the Donner adapter renders it to an exact match (proven by the donner_svg2_pilot parity test). A named color fills the shape interior.

requirements.assertion: The initial value of the fill property is the color black.
requirements.subject: user-agent

requirements.assertion: The initial fill-rule is nonzero, which includes a point when the signed count of path-segment crossings of a ray from the point is non-zero.
requirements.subject: user-agent

requirements.assertion: With fill-rule evenodd, a point is inside the shape when the number of path-segment crossings of a ray from the point is odd.
requirements.subject: user-agent
requirements.rationale: Reviewed mapping: the resvg pilot case painting/fill-rule/evenodd isolates this requirement, its upstream golden is a conforming oracle for this simple assertion by specification inspection, and the Donner adapter renders it to an exact match (proven by the donner_svg2_pilot parity test). The evenodd interior is filled.

requirements.assertion: fill-opacity specifies the opacity of the fill painting operation, with 1 fully opaque.
requirements.subject: user-agent
requirements.rationale: Reviewed mapping: the resvg pilot case painting/fill-opacity/50percent isolates this requirement, its upstream golden is a conforming oracle for this simple assertion by specification inspection, and the Donner adapter renders it to an exact match (proven by the donner_svg2_pilot parity test). A half-opacity fill is composited.

requirements.assertion: A fill-opacity value outside the range 0 to 1 must be clamped to that range.
requirements.subject: user-agent
